cards.back: A binary tree where the height of the two subtrees of every node differs by at most one.
A comparison-based sorting algorithm that uses a binary heap data structure to sort elements.
A specialized tree-based data structure that satisfies the heap property: the parent node is either greater than (max heap) or less than (min heap) its child nodes.
The child node of a parent node located on the left side of the parent node.
A property of a heap where the parent node is either greater than (max heap) or less than (min heap) its child nodes.
